title: Light Indian Baby New Potatoes Gulab Jamun
description: A herbal and light Indian dish featuring baby new potatoes in a gulab jamun form, made with a soffritto base and whole30 friendly ingredients. This quick fix dish is perfect for a snack or dessert.
instructions: Boil the baby new potatoes in salted water until they are tender.
Drain the potatoes and let them cool.
In a pan, heat the ghee over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion to the pan and saute until it is translucent.
Add the grated ginger and minced garlic to the pan and saute for another minute.
Mash the cooled potatoes and add them to the pan.
Mix well and cook for 2-3 minutes.
In a small bowl, mix the rose water, lemon juice, and honey.
Add the rose water mixture to the pan and mix well.
Add the cardamom powder and salt to the pan and mix well.
Shape the mixture into small balls and serve.
